title: Tolan Navy Yards
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tolan Navy Yards''', also known as the '''Tolan Naval Installation''', was a [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] facility on [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tolan]], located relatively close to [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]].

==History==
When the Imperial Navy destroyed the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base on Dankayo, the [[Imperial Armored Transport]] [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']] was charged with gathering and transporting wreckage from the facility, including sensitive datapacks. On leaving Dankayo, the ''Elusive'' was attacked by the Rebel shuttle ''[[Bonderium]]'', but while she escaped, her [[Captain/Legends|captain]] ordered her to divert to Tolan for repairs.

While at the Navy Yard, the ''Elusive'' not only had her battle damage repaired, but was also fitted with an external rack carrying a force of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. Her stopover in the yard was relatively brief, however, and she quickly resumed course for [[Coronar]].

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
